title: hieracium tenebricosum subsp. denigrans
intro: Hieracium tenebricosum subsp. denigrans, also known as the dark hawkweed, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It is a medicinal plant used to treat various health issues due to its rich content of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. The medicinal properties of Hieracium tenebricosum subsp. denigrans include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help alleviate conditions such as wounds, fever, and respiratory problems. Traditional herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat a range of health benefits including reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and promoting wound healing.
